title: Gooey Indulgent Ukrainian Cheese Lasagna
description: This dish is an earthy and indulgent Ukrainian lasagna featuring vinaigrette dressing and a blend of cheeses, with a low-sodium twist and a satisfying cheese pull.

ingredients.name: Ukrainian cheese
ingredients.notes: such as Kiev or Ukrainian feta

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, rehydrate the dehydrated mushrooms according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, Ukrainian cheese, spinach, and beaten egg, and mix well.
Add the rehydrated mushrooms and vinaigrette dressing to the cheese mixture and stir until combined.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the cheese mixture on the bottom.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the cheese layer.
Spread half of the remaining cheese mixture over the noodles.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the remaining cheese mixture, and finally another layer of noodles.
Top the final layer of noodles with the shredded mozzarella cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
